commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Gateway chat-history sanitization and regression tests to hide legacy runtime-only transcript rows from WebChat/history while preserving raw transcript sequence accounting.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main lacks handling for the quoted legacy runtime wrappers and `System:` status shapes covered by the PR tests, while the PR body gives red-first and after-fix terminal projection checks; I did not execute tests in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are concrete sanitizer and regression-test repairs that can be attempted as one focused rebase-aware fix branch.

target.title: fix(webchat): hide legacy runtime transcript wrappers
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: legacy session history can already contain runtime-only prompts as quoted internal-context wrappers, `System: [...] Background task ...` status lines, or gateway restart `System:` status blocks, which still show up in WebChat/history after the newer write-path fix.
- Why it matters: these rows are not user-authored transcript content and can expose internal task metadata/noise in visible chat surfaces.
- What changed: `chat.history` projection now unwraps legacy quote wrappers only when the inner text is a known runtime prompt, strips standalone or prefixed background-task status lines including end-of-string cases, strips gateway restart status blocks, hides now-empty visible history rows, and preserves following real user text.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): this does not rewrite transcript files and does not change the newer persistence path fixed by #71229.

## Change Type (select all)

- [x] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Related #71229
- Related #71312
- [x] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: the history sanitizer only recognized internal context delimiters when the marker began at a real line boundary, so quote-wrapped legacy rows bypassed the existing internal-context stripper. Background-task and gateway-restart status rows also were not modeled as legacy runtime-only transcript text.
- Missing detection / guardrail: regression coverage did not include quote-wrapped persisted runtime prompts, standalone background-task status text, failed background-task prefixes, gateway restart status blocks, or truncated internal-context completion payloads.
- Contributing context (if known): #71229 fixed the forward write path, but legacy persisted rows still need a display projection when existing sessions are read.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [ ] Unit test
  - [x] Seam / integration test
  - [ ] End-to-end test
  - [ ] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file: `src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts`
- Scenario the test should lock in: quote-wrapped failed ACP internal-context wrappers are omitted from history; standalone background-task status without a trailing newline is omitted; mixed background-task status plus a real user line preserves only the real user text; gateway restart status blocks preserve only the following real user text; truncated quote-wrapped internal-context completion rows, full subagent completion internal-context events, and quote-wrapped startup prompts are omitted.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: `buildSessionHistorySnapshot` is the Gateway history projection path used before WebChat/history delivery.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any): existing legacy internal-envelope test covered unquoted delimiter blocks only.
- If no new test is added, why not: N/A

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Existing WebChat/history views no longer show legacy runtime-only rows that were already persisted as quoted internal-context prompts, background-task status lines, or gateway restart status blocks.

## Diagram (if applicable)

```text
Before:
[legacy transcript row] -> [chat.history] -> [internal status text visible]

After:
[legacy transcript row] -> [history projection] -> [hidden if runtime-only]
[background/gateway status + real text] -> [history projection] -> [real text only]
```

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? No
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? No
- New/changed network calls? No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? No
- Data access scope changed? No
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation: N/A

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: macOS
- Runtime/container: local Node/pnpm repo checkout
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): Gateway WebChat/history
- Relevant config (redacted): N/A

### Steps

1. Build a session history snapshot from a persisted user row containing a quote-wrapped `<<<BEGIN_OPENCLAW_INTERNAL_CONTEXT>>>...<<<END_OPENCLAW_INTERNAL_CONTEXT>>>` failed ACP/subagent event.
2. Build a snapshot from a persisted user row containing only `System: [timestamp] Background task done: ...` with no trailing newline.
3. Build a snapshot from a persisted user row containing a failed background-task status followed by `[Sat 2026-04-25 ...] 检查codex 状态`.
4. Build a snapshot from a persisted user row containing a gateway restart status block followed by `[Sat 2026-04-25 ...] 好了吗`.
5. Build a snapshot from the quote-wrapped ACP Codex gateway restart sample ending in `[Sat 2026-04-25 17:21 GMT+8] 跑真实 assistant output smoke，不只看 session created。`.
6. Build a snapshot from the quote-wrapped Codex review sample with a `Background task done` prefix followed by `[Sat 2026-04-25 17:23 GMT+8] 你和codex 沟通审视：https://github.com/openai/codex`.
7. Build a snapshot from the quote-wrapped, truncated ACP internal-context completion sample that includes the Codex review result body.
8. Build a snapshot from the quote-wrapped `Background task done` prefix followed by `[Sat 2026-04-25 17:44 GMT+8] continue`.

### Expected

- Runtime-only rows are omitted from visible history.
- Mixed rows preserve only the real user text, e.g. `升级前 5 分钟 checklist`, `检查codex 状态`, `好了吗`, `跑真实 assistant output smoke，不只看 session created。`, `你和codex 沟通审视：https://github.com/openai/codex`, or `continue`.
- Raw transcript sequence tracking still accounts for the raw rows.

### Actual

- Matches expected after this patch.

## Evidence

- [x] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [ ] Trace/log snippets
- [ ] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

## Human Verification (required)

- Verified scenarios:
  - Red test first: `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK=0 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE=0 pnpm test src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts` failed on the 3 original regressions before the fix.
  - New sample red test: gateway restart status block failed before the follow-up sanitizer patch; failed background-task prefix already passed with the background-task stripper.
  - Exact ACP Codex smoke sample: direct projection produced only `跑真实 assistant output smoke，不只看 session created。`; then this exact quote-wrapped payload was added as a regression test.
  - Exact Codex review samples: direct projection produced only `你和codex 沟通审视：https://github.com/openai/codex`; then the background-task prefix and truncated internal-context completion payload were added as regression tests.
  - Exact continue sample: direct projection produced only `continue`; then this exact quote-wrapped payload was added as a regression test.
  - Exact full subagent completion internal-context sample: projection produced no visible history rows; then this payload was added as a regression test.
  - Exact quote-wrapped startup prompt sample: projection produced no visible history rows; then this payload was added as a regression test.
  - Gateway targeted tests after latest regression: `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK=0 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE=0 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 pnpm test src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/chat-sanitize.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts` passed, 3 files / 80 tests.
  - Direct smoke via `pnpm exec tsx` produced `{ rawTranscriptSeq: 3, texts: ["升级前 5 分钟 checklist"] }` for the original legacy shapes.
  - After rebasing onto latest `origin/main`, the previously failing auto-reply CI shard files also passed locally: `OPENCLAW_LOCAL_CHECK=0 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE=0 pnpm test src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/chat-sanitize.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.acp-abort.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts`, 5 files / 72 tests.
  - Broad local `check:changed` was attempted after dependency refresh: conflict markers, core typechecks, core lint, import cycles, and auth/webhook guards passed; the broad changed-test lane hit local Vitest worker OOM after 211 files / 2703 tests passed. A high-heap retry avoided OOM but hit the test runner no-output timeout. CI is the source of truth for the full changed sweep.
- Edge cases checked: quote-wrapped internal context, truncated internal context, background status with no trailing newline, failed background status plus real user text, gateway restart block plus real user text, quote-wrapped ACP Codex gateway restart smoke request, Codex review request with URL, quote-wrapped continue request, full subagent completion internal-context event, quote-wrapped startup prompt, mixed background status plus real user text, heartbeat/internal-only history filtering from latest main, directive-only assistant send regression.
- What you did **not** verify: live installed Gateway/WebChat UI against a real user profile.

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? Yes
- Config/env changes? No
- Migration needed? No
- If yes, exact upgrade steps: N/A

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: over-stripping user-authored text that happens to look like runtime status.
  - Mitigation: quote unwrapping only applies when the inner text matches known legacy runtime prompts; background-task stripping is limited to the exact legacy `System: [timestamp] Background task ...:` prefix shape; gateway restart stripping is limited to the exact legacy `System: [timestamp] Gateway restart...` block shape and preserves following user text.
## CI Note

- This PR also includes a two-line macOS SwiftFormat cleanup in `apps/macos/Sources/OpenClaw/ExecAllowlistMatcher.swift` and `apps/macos/Sources/OpenClaw/ExecApprovals.swift` to clear the current `macos-swift` CI failure inherited from latest `origin/main`; no behavior change.
